meaning: diphtheria,pertussis,tetanus 白喉、百日咳、破伤风混合疫苗
examples: Ten minutes of activity per day is a good start, says Marcus Jackovitz, DPT, a physical therapist at the University of Miami Hospital.
DPT spokesman Palden Tshering says no one expected such a landslide.
Of the two parties, the Druk Phuensum Tshogpa (DPT) won 44 out of 47 seats.
Two of the three companies making the DPT vaccine stopped distributing it, leaving only one company, Lederle (now owned by Wyeth which is now owned by Pfizer) supplying it.
